calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Requiring Trustee To Render Account
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Piccinini appearing for petitioners. Randall Stein appearing for and with Shirley Hepburn. The trustee has filed her accounting. Mr. Piccinini wants to reserve his right to file objections to the account. The petition to file an accounting has been met. Court is making no finding on the accounting. The trustee has complied with the June 19, 2006 order. Mr. Stein will prepare an order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Karla Davis, CSR#12998. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Order Requiring Trustee To Render Account
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Continued To Dec-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Piccinini appearing for petitioners. Guardian ad litem Carl Baisley is in court. Randall Stein appearing for and with respondent Shirley Hepburn. Mr. Stein reports to the Court that some records have been produced to Mr. Piccinini and he is getting more records. He does not know the starting date and the starting amount. Court wants Mr. Stein to file and serve an accounting to the best of his ability by 11/27. Mr. Piccinini to filed objections before 12/11. Matter is continued to 12/11. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patty Hubble CSR#3058. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Order Requiring Trustee To Render Account
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Continued To Oct-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Piccinini appearing for petitioner. Carl Baisley, Guardian Ad Litem is in court. Randall Stein appearing for and with respondent Shirley Hepburn. Mr. Randall is working on obtaining bank records and processing accounting records. The Court's order was he is to file an accounting. Court wants Mr. Stein to share information with Mr. Puccinini. Mr. Puccinini states his concerns about the trustee not paying for the beneficiaries' tuitions. Mr. Stein argues that the trustee has given notice to Mr. Baisley that the Trust is not going to pay the tuitions. It is Mr. Baisley's responsiblity to pay for the support and tuition for his children. Matter is continued to 10/16 for status on report of meeting and the accounting. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Order Requiring Trustee To Render Account
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Continued To Oct-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Requiring Trustee To Render Account
Off Calendar Jun-19-2006 Continued To Sep-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Piccinini appearing for and with Aisha shears and with Carl Baisley as guardian as litem for the two minors. The two minors Crystal and Jessica Baisley are also in court. Randolph Stein appearing for and with Shirley Hepburn, trustee. Court is ordering the trustee to file an accounting for the family trust beginning with Emanuel's D.O.D. on 5/29/2002 by 9/11/06. Accounting will not be set for hearing. If Mr. Piccinini has objections to the acocunting he will file a new petition. Matter is continued to 9/11. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
